runs.note: Added backward compatibility for old OAuth scope formats during the 12-month transition period. The service now maps old scopes (read/write/admin) to their new fine-grained equivalents, handles scope downgrades by intersecting requested and approved scopes, logs deprecation usage, and always returns tokens with new scope format only.
